rationale: User complaint about tailing empty capped collection; no specific spec rule cited, operational/UX issue.
Regression broke negative limit behavior; no specific spec rule named, implementation regression.
ObjectId non-uniqueness on z-system architecture; platform-specific implementation bug, not BSON spec violation.
Bulk update_one filter not matching documents; implementation bug, no specific spec rule identified.
Cursor not found errors under production load with mongos; operational/support issue, no spec rule.
Segfault in OpenSSL socket read under threading; OS-level crash, no spec behavior involved.
Nil socket write error on primary failover; implementation null-check bug, no specific spec rule violated.
Sporadic CR auth under load; driver may lose server feature state during election, speculative diagnosis, no spec rule cited.
NoMethodError calling each on nil in usersInfo result; Ruby error-handling bug, no spec rule.
Driver does not validate response requestId matches original request; wire protocol spec requires this matching.
SocketError on primary restart/re-election; implementation socket management bug, no specific spec rule named.
Packaging bug: pry included as a hard dependency instead of optional; no spec involvement.
Spec requires w:0 unacknowledged writes use legacy OP_INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE; driver was using command protocol instead.
API naming inconsistency between driver and Mongoid for expire_after option; no cross-driver or spec issue.
GridFS file.length returns 1 instead of actual file length; GridFS spec defines the length field semantics.
count/distinct ignore read preference; server-selection spec requires read preference applied to all read operations.
Sporadic unauthorized errors in production; support/operational issue with no reproducible spec violation.
Links directly to server-selection spec; spec states localThresholdMS configurable only at client level, driver allowed other levels.
Write concern spec prohibits including writeConcern param when user has not specified one; driver was including it.
Improvement to support custom GridFS file ids; proactive spec rollout (Depends: DRIVERS-299), issuetype Improvement.
Improvement to auto-kill exhausted cursors via finalizer; UX/resource management enhancement, not a spec violation.
Improvement to fail-fast on wrong replica set name; UX improvement, SDAM spec does not mandate this fast-fail behavior.
SDAM spec requires marking server Unknown and disconnecting when auth fails; driver was not doing this.
Improvement to support Kerberos realm option; proactive spec rollout (Depends: DRIVERS-278), issuetype Improvement.
Collation spec requires error when collation used on server < 3.4; driver skipped check when collation key was a String.
Socket blocked indefinitely in ppoll with no timeout; OS-level socket timeout implementation bug, no spec rule.
Description explicitly states BSON spec requires {"$timestamp":{"t":...,"i":...}}; driver returns {"t":...,"i":...} without wrapper.
Explicitly references command-monitoring spec section; driver not unwrapping $query as filter in CommandStartedEvent.
Misleading log message when native extension missing; documentation/UX bug, no spec involvement.
Driver sends batchSize=0 in getMore when limit=0; server rejects it; cursors spec defines valid batchSize values for getMore.
BSON key validation incorrectly rejects dotted index keys (valid in MongoDB); implementation over-validation bug.
Duplicate of RUBY-1163; same BSON key validation over-restriction on dotted embedded document index keys.
BSON spec defines regex option encoding; deserializing drops options, violating spec-mandated round-trip fidelity.
Gemspec dependency version constraint too strict; packaging/dependency management issue, no spec involvement.
JRuby native extension returns Bignum instead of Fixnum for Int64; JRuby/MRI type-system implementation difference.
BSON spec mandates little-endian byte order; on PPC64 big-endian system all integer/float serialization is wrong.
Test assertion about Fixnum/Bignum class fails on 32-bit; test correctness issue, not a BSON spec violation.
Documentation improvement suggestion for auth_mech option handling; no spec violation.
YAML parsing returns String for connect option when Symbol expected; Ruby config parsing bug, no spec rule violated.
Negative timeout passed to Kernel::select after slow read; socket timeout arithmetic implementation bug.
Count performance 2x slower in 2.3 driver vs 2.2; performance regression, no spec rule involved.
Native extension build failure on Windows with DevKit; build/packaging issue, no spec involvement.
Segfault in native BSON::Buffer.new; native extension crash, no spec rule.
CMAP spec defines pool size validation; driver did not reject min_pool_size > max_pool_size at client construction time.
Ruby 2.4 warning for forwarding to private method; language compatibility/code quality issue, no spec.
Connection string spec requires URI-encoding of username/password; driver was not doing this. Depends on DRIVERS-391.
Race condition in ObjectId clone causing shared mutable state; native extension threading bug, not a BSON spec violation.
SDAM debug logging too noisy when server state unchanged; logging UX improvement, no spec rule violated.
Unhelpful error message when min_pool_size=nil passed; error message quality followup to RUBY-1201, not a spec issue.
